Feature-gated page via AppLayout feature prop

AdminTable with custom cell renderers per column

The feature requires: admin view (all users/companies), supervisor/mentor view (subordinates only), rights config page (restrict report types per role)
Report types to download: annual targets, self assessments, feedback, competency evaluation
Bulk download: select by company, select all/some users, download as ZIP archive
